improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for business owners and traders. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and professional trade support. Try Gideon free today.">
improvements.rationale: These tags improve search engine visibility by clearly communicating the product value proposition within character limits. The Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. Mentioning the free trial lowers perceived risk and encourages clicks.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product by name and clearly states what it does, building recognition and trust. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial offer. 'No credit card required' removes friction and increases trial conversions. Copy is concise, benefit-driven, and avoids unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to join as a member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's voice chat, members workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most likely friction point for new visitors—what happens when the free trial ends. It transparently explains the paywall, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and highlights the annual savings incentive, reducing uncertainty and encouraging conversion.
